title: Cyclobalanus omalokos

This subfamily consists of shrubs and small trees that are often found in acidic, nutrient-poor soils. The Ericaceae family is further divided into several subfamilies and tribes, with Cyclobalanus omalokos being a part of this complex classification system. intro: Cyclobalanus omalokos, also known as the Cyclobalanus tree, is a species of plant in the family Lauraceae, native to the tropical regions of the Pacific Islands.
